---
title: "#histopathology-image-analysis"
format: gfm
---


## 2025-01-28

*13:23:27 - @Levi Waldron has joined the channel*
*13:23:34 - @Sehyun Oh has joined the channel*

## 2025-01-29

*17:11:08 - @Sean Davis has joined the channel*
*17:11:08 - @Hervé Pagès has joined the channel*
*17:11:08 - @Davide Risso has joined the channel*
*17:11:08 - @Vince Carey has joined the channel*
*17:12:10 - @Lucio Queiroz has joined the channel*
*17:14:04 - @Marcel Ramos Pérez has joined the channel*
*17:16:20 - @Mohamed Omar has joined the channel*
**Sehyun Oh** (17:16:32):
> Our meeting notes/schedules/link are[HERE](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1AQzizrfpLc3D-S4LacMucMvZeRFBzf65fZ4k1bfizi4/edit?usp=sharing).


## 2025-02-04

*00:13:19 - @Charlotte Soneson has joined the channel*
*01:53:01 - @Chenyue Lu has joined the channel*
*02:46:24 - @Phil Cheng has joined the channel*
*03:11:27 - @Artür Manukyan has joined the channel*
*05:06:01 - @Stephanie Hicks has joined the channel*
*07:22:07 - @Ilaria Billato has joined the channel*
*07:48:56 - @chiara romualdi has joined the channel*
*12:22:48 - @Tyrone Lee has joined the channel*
*13:47:50 - @Ludwig Geistlinger has joined the channel*
*17:04:34 - @Lukas Weber has joined the channel*

## 2025-02-05

*01:30:14 - @Samuel Gunz has joined the channel*
*02:22:55 - @Himel Mallick has joined the channel*
*14:05:57 - @Alik Huseynov has joined the channel*

## 2025-02-24

*07:13:33 - @Alan O'C has joined the channel*

## 2025-03-19

**Hervé Pagès** (01:01:01):
> Hi all, I'm not feeling well and won't be able to attend our meeting tomorrow. I'll catch up later with MeetGeek.


## 2025-04-15

**USLACKBOT** (15:53:09):
> ***eslam.abousamra32***from***WaldronLab***was added to this channel by***shbrief***. You can review their permissions in Channel Details. Happy collaborating!
